OUR PROFESSIONALISM

The Photographer Behind Every Frame

Papai Pakhira is the founder and lead photographer of Papai Studio — a name synonymous with precision, artistry, and client trust across West Bengal.

With years of dedicated expertise in wedding and event photography, Papai-da brings an intuitive eye for emotion, light, and composition. His approach is entirely client-focused — patient, respectful, and deeply committed to delivering polished, publication-quality results for every family.

He operates exclusively with world-class, professional-grade equipment:

NIKON Z6 II / Z8 Full-Frame Mirrorless
📷
Nikon Z6 II & Z8 — Full-Frame Mirrorless Dual professional bodies — the Z6 II for precision wedding work and the Z8 as a high-resolution backup. Full-frame sensors deliver stunning low-light performance, exceptional dynamic range, and true-to-life colour rendering in every condition.
🔭
Nikkor Z-Mount Prime & Zoom Lenses Premium Nikkor Z-series glass — engineered to match the resolving power of full-frame sensors, delivering razor-sharp edges, smooth cinematic bokeh, and accurate colour across all focal lengths.
🎞
Professional Colour Grading & Retouching Every delivered gallery is meticulously colour-graded, skin-tone corrected, and retouched to a publication standard before handoff — zero raw, unfinished images.
500+Events Covered
5★Avg. Rating
6+Years Active

TRANSPARENT PRICING

Invest in Memories

Every family is unique — so are our packages. We offer tailored coverage for full Bengali wedding ceremonies, Haldi, Reception, Rice Ceremonies, and exclusive Pre-Wedding drone sessions. Reach out for a personalised quote.

✓ Full Day Coverage ✓ Professional Photo Gallery ✓ 4K Video & Drone Shots ✓ Private Online Album ✓ Edited Photobook Available ✓ Raw Deliverables on Request
GET A QUOTE ON WHATSAPP

TESTIMONIALS

CLIENT LOVE

★★★★★

"Papai Studio completely transformed our wedding photography. The color grading and cinematic depth was beyond anything we expected. Every photo tells a story."

— Anjali & Rohan Sengupta, Howrah
★★★★★

"The drone video during our Haldi ceremony was mind-blowing! The aerial footage of our mandap made our wedding film look like a Bollywood movie. Highly recommended!"

— Priya & Debashish Roy, Kolkata
★★★★★

"Best photography studio in West Bengal hands down. We did our son's rice ceremony (annaprashan) and the photos are absolutely priceless. They treat you like family."

— Pradip Das, Uluberia
★★★★★

"We were nervous about photography but Papai-da made us so comfortable. The Sindoor Daan shots are absolutely magical. 10/10 would recommend to every Bengali couple."

— Susmita & Arnab Ghosh, Santragachi

© 2026 PAPAI STUDIO  ·  WEST BENGAL, INDIA

Crafted with ❤ for every Bengali love story

Traditional Bengali Weddings

From the sacred Chandan ritual to the poignant Sindoor Daan — every Bengali wedding ceremony is a visual treasure. Papai Studio documents it all with patience, care, and technical excellence using full-frame Nikon Z6 bodies.

Haldi / Gaye Holud

The Gaye Holud is the most joyful, candid ceremony of the Bengali wedding cycle. We capture the vibrant yellow hues, flower petal showers, and genuine family laughter in stunning clarity.

Drone Coverage

Professional licensed drone operations providing sweeping aerial 4K shots of your mandap, venue, and baraat procession. Add a truly cinematic dimension to your wedding album.

Rice Ceremony (Annaprashan)

A baby's first taste of rice is one the most tender family milestones. We shoot Annaprashan ceremonies with soft, warm lighting and portrait-optimised Nikkor lenses to perfectly capture your baby's innocent expressions and family joy.

Model Portfolio Shoots

Industry-standard editorial and portfolio photography for models, influencers and brands. We use professional studio lighting rigs, backdrops, and premium Nikkor glass to craft striking, gallery-worthy portfolios.

Birthdays & Grand Events

Papai Studio covers every milestone — Birthdays, Anniversaries, Corporate Events, and more. We also offer Passport Photos and Print services directly at our studio HQ.
